title: athlete-guardian — subprocessors
description: The AthleteGuardian module itself engages ZERO third-party subprocessors — every state transition happens within the Academorix platform. Downstream: notifications module dispatches guardian notifications; storage module (Wave 4+) stores verification documents.

downstream_subprocessors_referenced.used_for: Dispatching GuardianAdded / GuardianRemoved / GuardianVerified / etc. notifications via mail / SMS / push channels.
Signed verification document uploads for HR-manual verification workflow (Enterprise + athlete_guardian_verification entitlement on). 7-year retention aligned with guardian row.

notes: GDPR Art. 30 requires this record even when empty.

Adding a subprocessor to this module (e.g. ID-verification API for automated guardian identity proofing) requires: update this file + refresh compliance.json Art. 28 + notify tenants on the subprocessor list.
